name: Doodle Factory
short_description: Welcome to Doodle Factory - your ticket to the world of factory fun! Dive into building and designing with ever-changing boards. Get creative, boost your efficiency with cool upgrades, and make each factory uniquely yours!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Doodle Factory!

The perfect playground for budding factory builders! Dive into the fun with easy-going board designs that won't overwhelm. Upgrade at your own pace for a stress-free, creative adventure in factory bliss!

At Doodle Factory, we get it, factory building games can be intimidating. But fear not! We've crafted an experience just for you, with easy-going board designs that make the whole process a breeze. No need for a PhD in engineering here! Dive in, have fun, and build your dream factory without breaking a sweat. We're all about making the journey as enjoyable as the destination.

Game Features

  • Casual Factory Building: Dive into a laid-back factory-building experience designed for players of all skill levels.
  • Dynamic Board Management: Manage multiple boards to handle your factory. Iterate your boards to improve your strategy and unlock more upgrades a long the way.
  • Stress-Free Gameplay: Doodle Factory keeps it simple, making the journey as enjoyable as the destination.
  • Accessible for Newbies: A perfect entry point for newcomers to the factory-building genre, providing a welcoming and enjoyable experience.
  • Incremental Upgrades: Boost the efficiency of your machines and fine-tune your board generation capabilities.
  • Expert's Haven: Doodle Factory welcomes experts to showcase their mastery in intricate machine placement.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Hungarian*, Japanese*, Korean*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Swedish*
*languages with full audio support
